sql_array: CREATE TABLE intervals (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO intervals (id, duration) VALUES (1, to_milliseconds(1000));
UPDATE intervals SET duration = to_milliseconds(2000) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, duration FROM intervals WHERE duration > to_milliseconds(500);
SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM duration) * 1000) AS average_duration FROM intervals;
